item.title: Lego Marvel Iron Man Armory Toy Building Set 76216 Avengers Gift for 7 Plus Year Old Kids Boys & Girls Iron Man Pretend Play Toy Marvel Building Kit with MK3 MK25 and MK85 Suit Minifigures
item.description: You can find Lego Marvel Iron Man Armory Toy Building Set 76216 Avengers Gift for 7 Plus Year Old Kids Boys & Girls Iron Man Pretend Play Toy Marvel Building Kit with MK3 MK25 and MK85 Suit Minifigures with a discount here: ℹ️: This LEGO set makes a great birthday or Christmas gift for all young Avengers fans, boys and girls who love toys based on the Marvel Universe Children can use the platform to change Tony Starks Avengers armor and carry out repairs using the included tool accessories This fun-filled set puts endless Iron Man action into the hands of young Super Heroes Ages 7+ and fans of the Marvel Studios Infinity Saga This LEGO Marvel building toy features Tony Starks headquarters with his Hall of Armor room, high-tech Iron Man suits and a workshop area Includes 5 minifigures of Tony Stark, Pepper Potts, Nick Fury, War Machine and Whiplash and 3 high tech battle suits: the MK3, MK25 and MK85 Includes digital instructions with the LEGO Building Instructions app, allowing children to zoom and rotate while building the model Features a toy sports car with Stark Expo model-map, robot assistant arm, workshop area with tools, 3 holographic displays, and changing platform 🛒 Buy it!
